overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a vast, ornate library with towering bookshelves, spiral staircases, and warm ambient lighting. The character walks through corridors and grand halls filled with books, passing fireplaces and decorative objects before entering a private study room with scientific instruments.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow library corridor with spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow library corridor lined with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, passing a spiral staircase on the right

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves packed with leather-bound books
wrought iron spiral staircase winding upward between bookshelves
ornate hanging lantern providing warm yellow light
patterned oriental rug on the wooden floor
thick wooden column supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, warmly lit library corridor with towering wooden bookshelves on both sides. A spiral staircase is visible to the right, and decorative rugs cover the wooden floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library hall with towering columns

events.description: passing through a grand archway from the narrow corridor into an expansive hall with towering columns

agents.ego_description: walking through a magnificent grand hall with towering columns and glass display cases, passing wooden reading tables

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the entrance to the grand hall
massive wooden columns supporting the high ceiling
wooden display case with glass top containing artifacts
long wooden table for reading and study
classic green glass banker's lamp on the reading table

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast grand hall with towering wooden columns and a high ceiling. Glass display cases and wooden reading tables with green lamps line the space. The character walks across the marble floor, leaving the narrow corridor behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: library hall with lit fireplace and reading areas

events.description: approaching a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire that casts warm orange light across the room

agents.ego_description: walking past a roaring stone fireplace and leather armchairs, heading toward an ornate carved wooden door at the far end

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with active fire and mantelpiece
upholstered leather reading chair facing the fireplace
heavy carved wooden door with metal fixtures and a compass rose design above
large ceramic vase on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the grand hall, passing a warm, glowing stone fireplace with leather armchairs arranged before it. An ornate wooden door with intricate carvings stands at the end of the hall, while the space remains illuminated by ambient lamplight.

events.description: turning right into a narrow corridor lined with bookshelves, leaving the grand hall behind

agents.ego_description: turning right at the ornate door into a narrow corridor, walking toward a distant archway leading to another room

entered.detail: tight rows of bookshelves lining the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the ornate door into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with bookshelves on both sides. The space is tighter than the previous grand hall, creating an intimate, enclosed feeling as the character approaches a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: private study room with desk and scientific instruments

events.description: entering a private study room containing a wooden desk, telescope, and antique globes

agents.ego_description: walking around the study room, examining the brass telescope and antique globes, then stopping near the bookshelves to look around

entered.detail: large wooden writing desk with papers and objects on top
antique brass telescope on a tripod stand
vintage terrestrial globe on a wooden stand
portrait paintings in frames hanging on the walls
green banker's lamp on the wooden desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy private study room with a wooden desk, a brass telescope, and antique globes. The room features framed portraits on the walls and a green desk lamp providing focused light. The character explores the space, examining the scientific instruments before stopping near the bookshelves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ornate library that transitions from narrow corridors to a vast grand hall before settling into an intimate private study. It begins by gliding through a warmly lit corridor flanked by towering wooden bookshelves and a spiral staircase, before the space suddenly opens into a grand hall with marble floors, massive wooden columns, and reading tables topped with green lamps. As the camera moves across the hall, it passes a glowing stone fireplace and leather armchairs, heading toward an intricately carved wooden door. The scene then shifts back into a tighter, dimly lit corridor that creates an enclosed feeling before finally passing through an archway into a cozy private study. This final space reveals a wooden desk equipped with a brass telescope, antique globes, and framed portraits, all illuminated by the focused glow of a desk lamp.
